flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Blue Ridge Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Blue Ridge Community College rose 62% between 2006 and 2009 (12.8% → 20.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Blue Ridge Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (63.0% → 70.2%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Blue Ridge Community College are 9% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($36.3k vs $33.4k).
